analyses.result_summary: The subgroup contrast in risk differences was -0.0166 (feature_027 effect in the high/present feature_022 stratum minus its effect in the low/absent stratum); interaction z-test p=0.0555.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `feature_052` at or below its median (<=16.53), patients with `feature_027` above its median (>1) have lower mean `objective_response` than patients with `feature_027` at or below its median (<=1).

Among patients with `feature_052` above its median (>16.53), patients with `feature_027` above its median (>1) have lower mean `objective_response` than patients with `feature_027` at or below its median (<=1).

The association between `feature_027` above its median (>1) and mean `objective_response` differs between the `feature_052` above its median (>16.53) and `feature_052` at or below its median (<=16.53) subgroups.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test for feature_027 within the low/absent stratum of feature_052.
analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_052` at or below its median (<=16.53), response was 12.49% for `feature_027` above its median (>1) (n=3852) versus 20.15% for `feature_027` at or below its median (<=1) (n=21151); risk difference -0.0766, p=0.0000.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test for feature_027 within the high/present stratum of feature_052.
analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_052` above its median (>16.53), response was 13.36% for `feature_027` above its median (>1) (n=3585) versus 19.40% for `feature_027` at or below its median (<=1) (n=21412); risk difference -0.0603, p=0.0000.

analyses.code: Difference-in-differences interaction test for feature_027 by feature_052.
analyses.result_summary: The subgroup contrast in risk differences was 0.0163 (feature_027 effect in the high/present feature_052 stratum minus its effect in the low/absent stratum); interaction z-test p=0.0610.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The three-way combination of `feature_025=1`, `feature_023=1`, and `feature_032=1` changes mean `objective_response` beyond the lower-order two-feature patterns.
The three-way combination of `feature_015=1`, `feature_025=1`, and `feature_032=1` changes mean `objective_response` beyond the lower-order two-feature patterns.

analyses.code: Three-way difference-in-differences test for feature_025 x feature_023 x feature_032.
analyses.result_summary: Eight-cell three-way difference-in-differences estimate was -0.1906 with minimum cell n=630; z-test p=2.043e-14, BH q=8.988e-13.

analyses.code: Three-way difference-in-differences test for feature_015 x feature_025 x feature_032.
analyses.result_summary: Eight-cell three-way difference-in-differences estimate was -0.1840 with minimum cell n=637; z-test p=2.052e-13, BH q=7.523e-12.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_047` in the upper quartile (>=128.05) have higher mean `objective_response` than patients with `feature_047` in the lower quartile (<=69.3175).
Patients with `feature_053` in the upper quartile (>=24.1) have lower mean `objective_response` than patients with `feature_053` in the lower quartile (<=6.2).

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response between the prespecified high and low groups for feature_047.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 19.33% for `feature_047` in the upper quartile (>=128.05) (n=12501) versus 18.29% for `feature_047` in the lower quartile (<=69.3175) (n=12500); risk difference 0.0104 (feature=1 minus feature=0), two-proportion z-test p=0.0356, BH q=0.2228.

analyses.code: Two-proportion z-test comparing objective_response between the prespecified high and low groups for feature_053.
analyses.result_summary: Response was 17.60% for `feature_053` in the upper quartile (>=24.1) (n=12514) versus 19.89% for `feature_053` in the lower quartile (<=6.2) (n=12592); risk difference -0.0229 (feature=1 minus feature=0), two-proportion z-test p=3.380e-6, BH q=2.817e-5.
